---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to the agent, harness, eval, or surfaces
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What's missing or painful today, and who it affects.

## Proposed change

What you'd like to see. Be concrete about the surface it touches (solver / harness /
golden set / store / playground / MCP / CI gate).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why you'd prefer this one.

## Does it affect the eval?

ForgeJudge's credibility rests on a contamination-resistant, deterministic eval.
If this changes grading, the golden set, or the gate, note how correctness/equivalence
stays provable (e.g. swebench-equivalence, mutation hardening, multi-seed CI).

## Additional context

Links, prior art, screenshots, or a sketch of the API.
